hero.title: Your property in the
hero.subtitle: Premium rental management & luxury concierge in Marrakech. We maximize your revenues, you enjoy peace of mind.

about.title: Excellence at the service
about.text: Guard Conciergerie Luxury Care was born from a passion for exceptional real estate and a total commitment to our owners. Based in Marrakech, our team of experts manages your property with the greatest care, combining cutting-edge technology with quality human service.
about.text2: We believe every property deserves special attention. That's why we offer a tailor-made service, adapted to your specific needs and local market requirements.
about.point_3: Premium partnerships with the best platforms

services.title: Management without
services.subtitle: From listing to welcoming your travelers, we manage everything for you with the highest level of excellence.

whyus.title: What makes us
whyus.reason_1_text: 5 years of experience on the local market. We know every neighborhood, every season, every opportunity.
whyus.reason_2_text: Real-time access to your dashboard. Revenue, expenses, bookings: nothing escapes you.
whyus.reason_3_text: 5-star hotel standards applied to your property. Your travelers always leave satisfied.
whyus.reason_4_text: Dynamic pricing and multi-platform. On average, our owners earn 40% more.
whyus.reason_5_text: Our team is available at all hours for you and your travelers. No emergency goes unanswered.
whyus.reason_6_text: Fast, qualified maintenance thanks to our network of trusted service providers in Marrakech.

process.title: 3 steps to
process.step_1_text: We visit your property, evaluate its rental potential and propose a personalized strategy.
process.step_2_text: Professional photo shoot, creation of optimized listings, pricing configuration. Your property is ready in 7 days.
process.step_3_text: We manage everything: bookings, check-in, cleaning, maintenance. You receive your income every month.

contact.title: Ready to maximize
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your property. Our team contacts you within 24 hours for a free assessment.
contact.info_text: Every property has unique potential. Let us show you how we can maximize it together.

footer.description: The luxury concierge that transforms your property into a profitable asset in Marrakech.

form.success_text: Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
